name: OVH
description: SIP template for OVH Telecom (OVHcloud). The SIP server is country-specific - use the host shown in your OVH VoIP interface (e.g. sip3.ovh.ch for CH, sbc6.fr.sip.ovh for FR).

fields.name: proxy
fields.description: OVH SIP server, country-specific (e.g. sip3.ovh.ch / sbc6.fr.sip.ovh) - see your OVH interface

fields.name: username
fields.description: Username is the OVH login (the full number, e.g. 0041... / 0033...)

fields.name: from-user
fields.description: From User is the OVH login

fields.name: auth-username
fields.description: Auth Username is the OVH login
